calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Continued To Jan-18-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Adam C. Kent, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Mufid Shehadeh, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Suresh Patel, CSV Hospitality Management, LLC or Marysville Hospitality, LLC.
Default as to defendant Suresh Patel was filed on April 13, 2010.
Defaults as to defendants CSV Hospitality Management, LLC and Marysville Hospitality, LLC were filed on August 6, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Charlie Patel was filed on February 16, 2010.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant Vikas Patel was filed today, December 2, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mufid Shehadeh, and against the Defaulted Defendants Suresh Patel, CSV Hospitality Management, LLC and Marysville Hospitality, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $119,100.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $54,454.64.
Attorney Fees - $8,000.00.
Costs - $710.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $182,264.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed the Court.

Settlement Protective Date.
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-07-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Adam C. Kent, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff Mufid Shehadeh.
Defendant Vikas Patel present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Parties agreed to settled in the sum of $60,000.00, payment by the defendant to be finalized on or before Sept. 9, 2010. Upon full payment plaintiff shall dismissed the action with prejudice against the defendant. If defendant failed, plaintiff shall have the judgment against the defendant in full, for the sum of $170,000.00 plus interest, fees and costs.
Matter is deemed settled between the parties and placed on a settlement protective date on Oct. 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Possible settlement with the defaulted defendants, the Court granted Platinff's request to re-schedule a future date for Default Prove-up Hearing in Dept. 218 against the remaining defaulted defendants.
Matter to be placed on the CRC 3.1385 OSC calendar for a dismissal as to co-defendant Vikas Patel, and pending the Default Prove-Up Hearing for judgment, or if the entire case is settled a dismissal as to the remaining defaulted defendants.
Assigned to Dept. 212 on DEC-07-2010 at 10:00 AM for Dismissal per CRC 3.1385.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
